tags.evidence: learn to welcome and attend
learn to welcome and attend
out of the underworld, toward the community
People gathered in Zuccotti Park
the form that could hold that flow
communities of practice that meet every week
refusing to wait for permission
governance that holds the field open
each one carrying what the underworld gave
the way your attention sits at this page
The angel pays attention
The council holds the seeing
the council has been gathered
the discipline of seeing what carried through
asks what in it is still good
the conversation with the herons
actually going into the parts
ready to be welcomed or refused
you name what is happening
while you read the room
hold what cannot be set down
sitting in among the regulars
carrying something for a long time
felt the weight come off my shoulders
There is a name I have
sculpting of a way of being
already built most of it
to be paid attention to it
you choose what cover you can raise
We ended up not opening
I will not. It was never mine
recognize the one already there
Now yours. Not on this page
the thing that will not happen
comes back to the next descent
Carry it as you walk
Share as much of it
to that cave came the sons of heroes
He could only suffer it, forever
blessed the night herons in the willow oaks
became the land inviting people into relationship
lost his idealism and had it transformed
This one names the wound
hold the book's full intellectual architecture
the collaboration finding the thread
Jason can verify the correspondence
Start with what they burned
attending to whether the water reaches
repairing what breaks
I became the land inviting them
could hold and place and return
quiet the subtle movements of my body
living things are here in the morning
I walk past it every morning
We tell them we love them
The people who bless the nests
awareness practices that let you see
first time I'd seen them here
training the attention so that the trickle
something worth watering
look back at the people who did this before
Rosa Luxemburg naming birds
the people who bless the nests
feel the quieted body that years
learning to know it with them
trains the attention toward what is real
telling them you love them
Finding the heron nests and telling
carry it forward without knowing
a practice to be continued
